steps.title: Identify Heidi's emotional response
steps.content: The key signal is the emotional description immediately following her scream: “glowing eyes” and “devoured the scene” unmistakably reveal fascination and delight, not fear or indifference.

steps.title: Match the emotion to the main idea
steps.content:
Choice B—”delighted and fascinated”—directly expresses the state Heidi enters through phrases like “glowing eyes” and “devoured the scene.” The other three either misread the emotional sequence (introducing fear or upset) or shift focus from her response to other details.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
